landing.hero_subtitle_a: After a humanitarian emergency, your contribution loses visibility the moment you hand it over. trackdon centralizes the whole flow:
landing.problem_title: The trail ends at the first hand-off.
landing.problem_p1: When an emergency hits, thousands donate: boxes of clothes, food, medicine, money. That aid passes through collection centers, foundations, influencers, volunteers. Donors never find out what happened to their donation.
landing.problem_p2: And there's always someone exploiting the urgency to skim resources. Without traceability, that leak is invisible.
landing.problem_card1_detail: Boxes that arrive at the center but never get inventoried.
landing.problem_card2_detail: Transfers to foundations and influencers that never publish how they were used.
landing.problem_card3_detail: There's no trusted register, opening the door to duplicates and opportunists.
landing.howit_subtitle: Every movement is recorded and can be checked from the public view — no login.
landing.howit_step1_body: You log what you donated and to which center or influencer. You get a tracking ID.
landing.howit_step2_body: Centers and influencers document custody, inventory and transfers. Every step is signed.
landing.howit_step3_body: Validators authorize affected individuals (third-party KYC, pseudonymous). Final delivery is also recorded.
landing.actors_donante_desc: Log your contribution and follow its journey. You decide whether to appear publicly.
landing.actors_centro_desc: Inventory, custody and move. Every responsible signs with their account.
landing.actors_influencer_desc: Receives cash. Reports back with receipts and documented transfers — not with stories.
landing.principles_title: Transparency for those who handle. Dignity for those who receive.
landing.principles_p: Centers, influencers and validators are subject to public scrutiny. Affected people appear as pseudonyms — only authorized validators see their real identity.
landing.principles_card1_body: Identity verification is handled by a specialized provider (Civic Pass / Truora / Persona). We don't manage sensitive PII.
landing.principles_card2_body: Repo is public (MIT). The register, photos and invoices live with strict permissions and are never exposed.
landing.cta_title: Building something like this? We need people.
landing.cta_subtitle: Looking for contributors in Next.js + Supabase, mobile design, Solana/Anchor (phase 2), legal and validation with NGOs.
landing.preview_title: Built for phone, transparent by default.
landing.preview_subtitle: Real app screenshots — not mockups. Every user gets a dashboard matching their responsibility.

auth.login_subtitle: Use your email to enter your dashboard.
auth.signup_subtitle: We create a donor profile. If you're joining as a collection center or influencer, we'll switch your role later.
auth.name: Your name (how you'll appear publicly)
auth.otp_note: We'll send a 6-digit code to your email to verify your account.
auth.verify_subtitle: We sent a 6-digit code to {email}. Paste it here to activate your account.
auth.verify_help: Didn't get it? Check spam or use the Resend code button.

donar.hub_title: What do you want to donate?
donar.hub_subtitle: trackdon doesn't hold funds — we're a public ledger. You deliver directly to the center or make the transfer, and here you log what happened so the trail stays public.
donar.hub_bienes_desc: Clothes, food, medicine, water, hygiene. You deliver at a center and here we log the trail.
donar.hub_transfer_desc: You send directly to a verified influencer or foundation. They upload the receipt and it stays in the public record.
donar.hub_no_cripto_title: Why we don't process crypto donations?
donar.hub_no_cripto_body: We decided not to be custodians. If trackdon received and distributed funds, we'd take on legal and fiduciary responsibility we don't want. Instead, we're the public record: you donate to whoever you pick (center or influencer), and the verifiable trace of what was done with it stays here.
donar.exito_subtitle: It's now in the public ledger. Anyone with the link can see your donation's journey.
donar.wizard_bienes_subtitle: Three steps: pick the event, point to the center you delivered to (or add one), and describe what you donated.
donar.wizard_transfer_subtitle: Three steps: pick the event, point to the influencer / foundation you sent to, and log the amount + receipt.
donar.wizard_step2_centro: Which center did you deliver to?
donar.wizard_step2_influencer: Which recipient did you send to?
donar.wizard_no_centros: No active centers for this event. Switch to I want to add it.
donar.wizard_no_influencers: No active influencers / foundations for this event yet.
donar.wizard_no_eventos: No active events yet. Ask an admin to create one.
donar.wizard_new_centro_help: A validator reviews it afterwards; your donation stays linked to this center.
donar.wizard_amount_hint_bienes: Approximate. If you don't know, leave it at zero.
donar.wizard_proof_help: Private — only the recipient and authorized validators see it.
donar.wizard_guard_subtitle_bienes: To log your delivery we need to link it to your account — so you can follow the trail and appear as donor. Takes 30 seconds.
donar.wizard_guard_subtitle_transfer: To log your transfer we need to link it to your account — so you can follow the trail. Takes 30 seconds.

denunciar.title: Report an irregularity
denunciar.subtitle: Public anonymously — only authorized validators can see your identity, and only to contact you for more info. Max 5 reports per user / 24 h.
denunciar.guard_subtitle: To report we need to know who's reporting — the data is not made public. Authorized validators see your identity only if they need to contact you; in the public board reports are anonymous to everyone else.
denunciar.type_responsable: Against a responsible person or volunteer
denunciar.target_label: Recipient ID (if you know it, optional)
denunciar.target_help: If you don't have it, describe in the next field.
denunciar.desc_placeholder: Describe what you saw with as much detail as possible. Dates, places, people if you know them.
denunciar.attach_help: Photos or PDFs. Max 10 MB each. Don't upload images with faces of affected people.
denunciar.contact_help: If you leave info, a validator can ask you for more details. If not, the report is fully anonymous.
denunciar.gracias_subtitle: An authorized validator will review it. If you left an email, we'll notify you there when it's resolved. Thanks for helping keep this transparent.

publico.title: Public board
publico.subtitle: Anyone can see from here how much has moved, which centers and influencers are active, and the state of each donation. The identity of affected people never appears — only pseudonyms.
publico.donaciones_empty_a: No donations registered yet. Be the first — tap

sobre.title: About trackdon
sobre.intro: trackdon is an open source application so that after a humanitarian emergency all the aid stays centralized, inventoried and traceable. Phone-first because most volunteers work from the field.
sobre.p_no_custody: trackdon is a public ledger, not a payment gateway nor intermediary. People donate directly to the center or influencer; here stays the verifiable record of what was delivered, who moved it and where it arrived. We don't receive or distribute money.
sobre.p_estado: Alpha. Runs on Supabase + Next.js + Vercel. The repo is public and anyone can audit the code or propose improvements.
sobre.p_privacy: The real identity of affected people is handled with outsourced KYC (Civic Pass, Truora or Persona). We only keep the minimum needed; the register is protected by Postgres RLS scoped to authorized validators.
sobre.card_contribute_body: Looking for people in Next.js + Supabase, mobile design, Solana / Anchor, legal and connection with NGOs. Open an Issue or a small PR and we'll talk.

influencer.perfil_stat_pendiente_hint: reports uploaded but not validated yet
influencer.perfil_progress_help: Only counts as delivered what's reconciled with a receipt verified by an authorized validator. What's uploaded without verification appears above as pending.
influencer.perfil_rendiciones_desc: Each line is an expense with a validated receipt. Unverified ones don't appear here.
influencer.perfil_rendiciones_empty: No verified reports yet. When there are, each receipt will appear listed with its validator.
influencer.perfil_card_subtitle: Once created, an authorized validator reviews it. Meanwhile you can receive donations and upload reports — only verified ones count as delivered.
influencer.perfil_form_slug_help: URL: /i/<slug>. Auto-generated from name if left blank.
influencer.perfil_form_evento_empty: No active events. Ask an admin to create one before creating your profile.

dashboard.centro_empty_title: You're not linked to any center
dashboard.centro_empty_body: Ask an admin to assign you as a responsible. Only registered responsibles of a center can view it here. If your center doesn't exist yet, an admin can create it and link you.
dashboard.centro_recientes_empty: No donations registered yet for this center.
dashboard.influencer_no_perfil_title: You don't have an influencer profile yet
dashboard.influencer_no_perfil_body: Create your profile to receive donations. Then an authorized validator reviews it and, if everything's in order, marks you as verified.
dashboard.influencer_pending_title: You're publicly visible as not verified.
dashboard.influencer_pending_body: An authorized validator reviews your profile soon. Meanwhile you can receive donations and upload reports — only verified ones count as delivered.
dashboard.influencer_progress_desc: Only counts as delivered what's reconciled with a receipt.
dashboard.influencer_rend_empty: No reports yet. Tap New report above to upload your first expense.
dashboard.nueva_rend_subtitle: Upload the receipt. A validator reviews it before it counts as delivered.
dashboard.nueva_rend_form_desc: Receipt is private, only validators see it.
dashboard.nueva_rend_help: Without receipt the report is still registered — but the validator will likely reject it. Upload it to speed up verification.
